messages.detailed:
Subject: Great connecting at DevFest Kolkata 2026!

Hi Sarah,

It was a pleasure meeting you at DevFest Kolkata 2026! I really enjoyed our conversation about AI safety.

Your insights on Machine Learning were particularly interesting.

I'd love to stay connected and explore potential collaboration opportunities.

Are you available for a quick 15-minute call next week? I'd be happy to work around your schedule.

Looking forward to staying in touch!

Best regards,
[Your Name]
